quoteLast: the signal for a general chase was made. The battle-cruisers quickly passed ahead of the _Carnarvon_ and overtook the _Kent_. The _Glasgow_ was ordered to keep two miles from the _Invincible_, and the _Inflexible_ was stationed on the starboard quarter of the flagship. Speed was eased to twenty knots at 11:15 A.M. to enable the other cruisers to get into station. At this time the enemy’s funnels and bridges showed just above the horizon.”
